summary: PR 2662 linked sysdolphin/baselib/quatlib.c by changing it from NonMatching to Matching, adjusting quatlib source expressions and stack padding, and converting several quatlib rodata/sdata2 symbols from global HSD_QuatLib_* names to local @ labels. The bot report records four new matches: HSD_QuatLib_8037EC4C, MatToQuat, .sdata2, and .rodata for main/sysdolphin/baselib/quatlib.

key_files.role: Quatlib source changes: local inline sqrtf using __frsqrte, MatToQuat local-expression cleanup, HSD_QuatLib_8037EC4C quaternion multiply rewrite, and HSD_QuatLib_8037EF28 expression inlining.
Build configuration changed sysdolphin/baselib/quatlib.c from NonMatching to Matching.
Symbol metadata changed quatlib-associated rodata and sdata2 entries from global HSD_QuatLib_* symbols to local @ labels with adjusted sizes/scopes.

what_changed: src/sysdolphin/baselib/quatlib.c removed the MSL/math_ppc.h include and added a local inline sqrtf implementation using __frsqrte and three Newton refinement steps with a volatile float temporary.
MatToQuat removed a separate tr local and reused s for the matrix trace calculation before sqrtf.
HSD_QuatLib_8037EC4C replaced many component temporaries with x/y/z/w result temporaries, wrote outputs after computing all components, and reduced PAD_STACK from 24 to 16.
HSD_QuatLib_8037EF28 inlined t2 as 2.0F * t inside the sinf expressions in the t < 0.5F branch.
config/GALE01/symbols.txt converted HSD_QuatLib_803B95E8 and HSD_QuatLib_804DE720 through HSD_QuatLib_804DE760 entries into local @ labels in .rodata and .sdata2.
The decomp bot reported +1204 matched-code bytes, +2728 linked-code bytes, +88 matched-data bytes, +88 linked-data bytes, and four new matches for quatlib.

smart_moves.text: The PR coupled the Matching flip with both source-level codegen adjustments and symbol metadata changes, matching the bot-reported code and data closures for quatlib.
For HSD_QuatLib_8037EC4C, computing x/y/z/w locals before storing through out reduced dependence on individual loaded component temporaries and coincided with a 100% match in the bot report.
The symbol changes avoided retaining global HSD_QuatLib_* names for constants that the diff represents as local labels, aligning metadata with local section ownership for this TU.

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small expression-lifetime changes can matter for MWCC matching in math-heavy baselib code: reusing an existing local for the MatToQuat trace and inlining a one-use t2 expression were part of the matched quatlib diff.

For quaternion component math, storing final x/y/z/w locals before writing the output struct can be a useful source shape to try when direct field stores and many preloaded component locals do not match.
When linking a previously nonmatching object, check whether associated float/double constants should be local @ labels rather than invented global TU-prefixed names.

naming_conventions.convention: Quatlib constant symbols in this PR were represented as local @ labels rather than global HSD_QuatLib_address names when the metadata was adjusted for matching.
Within HSD_QuatLib_8037EC4C, result component locals were named x, y, z, and w before assignment to out->x/y/z/w.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added a local inline sqrtf implementation using __frsqrte, repeated Newton refinement, and a volatile float temporary; this replaced reliance on included math_ppc behavior and coincided with MatToQuat reaching 100%.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The PR evidence shows the final diff and bot report, but not an isolated proof that the sqrtf inline alone caused the match.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjusted PAD_STACK in HSD_QuatLib_8037EC4C from 24 to 16 after rewriting temporaries and store order.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: PAD_STACK remains a matching tactic; loaded evidence has bot match output but no detailed objdiff excerpt or adjacent-function regression notes.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Changed .rodata and .sdata2 symbol metadata from global HSD_QuatLib_* entries to local labels, including size/scope adjustments, to close quatlib data matches.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Treat as symbol metadata/path-fact evidence for this PR, not a general rule that all TU-prefixed constants should become local labels.

review_feedback.feedback: Automated report recorded matched code 72.17% (+0.03%, +1204 bytes), linked code 47.24% (+0.07%, +2728 bytes), matched data 41.75% (+0.01%, +88 bytes), linked data 35.42% (+0.01%, +88 bytes), with four new matches for quatlib.

follow_up_queries: MatToQuat trace local s tr sqrtf match
HSD_QuatLib constants local labels sdata2 rodata

notes: The diff and changed-file metadata are complete for this slice and strongly support what changed.
The PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded evidence.
The automated bot report supports match outcomes, but no raw objdiff/checkdiff logs or isolated validation for each tactic are included.
Merged status is available in metadata, but acceptance rationale or reviewer intent is not evidenced.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Quatlib component-result locals helped close HSD_QuatLib_8037EC4C
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2662, HSD_QuatLib_8037EC4C was rewritten from many preloaded quaternion component temporaries and direct output stores into x/y/z/w result locals followed by output assignment, with PAD_STACK reduced from 24 to 16. The bot report lists HSD_QuatLib_8037EC4C as reaching 100%.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Quatlib matching required symbol metadata cleanup for local constants
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2662 changed multiple HSD_QuatLib_* rodata/sdata2 global symbols into local @ labels, and the bot report lists quatlib .rodata and .sdata2 as reaching 100%.

source_update_candidates.title: quatlib.c marked Matching in PR 2662
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2662 changed configure.py so sysdolphin/baselib/quatlib.c is Object(Matching) instead of Object(NonMatching).
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a source-owned path/build-state fact and should be reviewed before adding to path facts.

source_update_candidates.title: quatlib constants represented as local labels after PR 2662
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2662 changed HSD_QuatLib_803B95E8 and HSD_QuatLib_804DE720 through HSD_QuatLib_804DE760 symbol entries to local @ labels in config/GALE01/symbols.txt.
source_update_candidates.reason: Symbol scope/name facts belong in source/path metadata, not as a global decomp standard.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize this PR into a rule that local inline sqrtf should replace library sqrtf everywhere; the evidence is limited to quatlib and lacks isolated validation.
Do not treat PAD_STACK(16) as accepted style; it is a narrow matching tactic supported here only by the final diff and bot report.
Do not infer human review rationale because no human review comments are present in the loaded PR slice.
